conversation.content: make a game where a plain can fly with using A-S-D-W keys and other keys to contol the plain on a map with build with buidings

steps.description: Delete flawed FlightMechanicsScript in Baseplate and replace with a clean LocalScript in StarterPlayerScripts that implements smooth WASD-based flight physics (W=forward/throttle, S=reverse, A/D=roll/turn, Space/Ctrl=climb/dive) using HumanoidRootPart velocity-based movement

Create a robust RemoteEvent in ReplicatedStorage to handle player-initiated building placement requests, and a corresponding server-side Script in ServerScriptService that validates building placement (e.g., checks for terrain height, clear of obstacles) before cloning a prebuilt 'BuildingModel' from ServerStorage into Workspace

Add a Mouse Click LocalScript in StarterPlayerScripts that fires the RemoteEvent when player clicks a valid terrain location (requires raycasting from camera to terrain) and shows a preview part (floating translucent block) at the target location before confirmation

Create a BuildingCatalog ModuleScript in ReplicatedStorage with reusable building templates (e.g., 'SmallHut', 'Tower', 'Bridge') and helper functions for orientation and sizing, to support future building variety expansion

Implement a Player GUI in StarterGui with a minimap toggle button and a building-queue indicator, and add a LocalScript in StarterPlayerScripts to display a floating HUD showing current flight mode (Ground/Flight), altitude, and speed
